headline: Should D.R. Horton’s Order Growth Matching Community Expansion in Q2 2026 Require Action From DHI Investors?
summary: D.R. Horton’s recently reported fiscal Q2 2026 results showed 11% growth in new orders, in line with its community count expansion, underscoring steady operational execution in the latest quarter. An interesting aspect of this update is that new order growth closely tracked community growth, suggesting demand is keeping pace with the builder’s footprint rather than relying on outsized pricing or incentives. Next, we’ll examine how this alignment between new order and community growth shapes...
